cortex - Long-term memory for your AI agents.
npm package: @alaarab/cortex

Quick start:
  npx @alaarab/cortex init
  This creates ~/.cortex, registers MCP for detected agents, sets up lifecycle hooks, and registers your machine.
  Restart your agent after init. Context injection starts immediately.

MCP Tools (47):

  Search and browse:
    search_knowledge(query, type?, limit?, project?) - FTS5 search with synonym expansion
    get_memory_detail(id) - fetch full content of a memory by id (e.g. mem:project/filename)
    get_project_summary(name) - project summary card and file list
    list_projects() - all projects in active profile

  Backlog management:
    get_backlog(project?, id?, item?) - read backlog, or fetch a single item by ID or text
    add_backlog_item(project, item) - add task to Queue section
    add_backlog_items(project, items[]) - bulk add multiple tasks
    complete_backlog_item(project, item) - match by text, move to Done
    complete_backlog_items(project, items[]) - bulk complete multiple items
    update_backlog_item(project, item, updates) - change priority, context, or section

  Finding capture:
    add_finding(project, finding, citation?, findingType?) - append finding with optional citation and type tag
      findingType: "decision" | "pitfall" | "pattern"
    add_findings(project, findings[]) - bulk add multiple findings
    remove_finding(project, finding) - remove by matching text
    remove_findings(project, findings[]) - bulk remove multiple findings
    push_changes(message?) - commit and push all cortex changes

  Entity graph:
    search_entities(name) - find entities and their related docs
    get_related_docs(entity) - get docs linked to a named entity
    read_graph(project?) - read the entity graph for a project or all projects
    link_findings(project, finding_text, entity, relation?) - manually link a finding to an entity
    cross_project_entities() - find entities shared across multiple projects

  Session management (for agents without hooks):
    session_start(project?) - mark session start, retrieve prior session context
    session_end(summary?) - mark session end, save summary for next session
    session_context() - get current session state (project, duration, findings added)

  Memory quality:
    pin_memory(project, memory) - write canonical/pinned memory that bypasses decay
    memory_feedback(key, feedback) - record helpful/reprompt/regression outcomes

  Data management:
    export_project(project) - export project data as portable JSON
    import_project(data) - import project from exported JSON
    manage_project(project, action) - archive or unarchive a project

CLI Commands:

  cortex                               - interactive shell (TTY default)
  cortex shell                         - explicit shell mode
  cortex search <query>                - FTS5 search with synonym expansion
  cortex add-finding <project> "..."   - append a finding from the terminal
  cortex pin <project> "..."           - promote canonical memory
  cortex backlog                       - cross-project backlog view
  cortex skill-list                    - list installed skills
  cortex doctor [--fix] [--agents]     - health checks with optional self-heal
  cortex review-ui [--port=3499]       - lightweight memory review UI
  cortex status                        - health, active project, stats
  cortex update                        - update to latest version
  cortex verify                        - post-init verification

  cortex config policy get|set ...     - retention, TTL, decay, confidence
  cortex config workflow get|set ...   - approval workflow settings
  cortex config access get|set ...     - role-based permissions
  cortex config index get|set ...      - indexer include/exclude globs
  cortex config machines               - registered machines
  cortex config profiles               - profiles and projects

  cortex maintain govern [project]     - queue stale/conflicting memories
  cortex maintain prune [project]      - delete expired entries
  cortex maintain consolidate [project]- deduplicate FINDINGS.md
  cortex maintain extract [project]    - mine git and GitHub signals
  cortex maintain migrate <project>    - promote legacy findings

  cortex mcp-mode on|off|status        - toggle MCP integration
  cortex hooks-mode on|off|status      - toggle hook execution

Environment Variables:

  CORTEX_PATH                    - override cortex directory (default: ~/.cortex)
  CORTEX_PROFILE                 - active profile name (filters indexed projects)
  CORTEX_ACTOR                   - identity for access control and audit logging
  CORTEX_DEBUG                   - set to 1 for debug logging to ~/.cortex/.runtime/debug.log
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_TOKEN_BUDGET    - max approx tokens injected by hook-prompt (default: 550)
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_SNIPPET_LINES   - max lines per injected snippet (default: 6)
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_SNIPPET_CHARS   - max chars per injected snippet (default: 520)
  CORTEX_FEATURE_AUTO_EXTRACT    - toggle git/GitHub mining in hook-prompt (default: on, set 0 to disable)
  CORTEX_FEATURE_DAILY_MAINTENANCE - toggle detached daily governance (default: on, set 0 to disable)
  CORTEX_FINDINGS_CAP            - max active findings before auto-archiving (default: 20)
  CORTEX_LLM_ENDPOINT            - OpenAI-compatible endpoint for semantic dedup/conflict
  CORTEX_LLM_KEY                 - API key for LLM endpoint (or OPENAI_API_KEY)
  CORTEX_LLM_MODEL               - model name for LLM endpoint
  CORTEX_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER      - "api" or unset; enables semantic search fallback
  CORTEX_FEATURE_SEMANTIC_DEDUP  - set 1 to enable LLM-based paraphrase dedup
  CORTEX_FEATURE_SEMANTIC_CONFLICT - set 1 to enable LLM-based contradiction detection

Key File Locations:

  ~/.cortex/                          - cortex root directory
  ~/.cortex/machines.yaml             - hostname-to-profile mapping
  ~/.cortex/profiles/                 - profile YAML files listing projects per profile
  ~/.cortex/<project>/summary.md      - five-line project summary card
  ~/.cortex/<project>/CLAUDE.md       - full project context (architecture, commands, conventions)
  ~/.cortex/<project>/reference/      - deep reference docs (API details, data models)
  ~/.cortex/<project>/FINDINGS.md     - bugs, patterns, decisions, things to avoid
  ~/.cortex/<project>/backlog.md      - task queue across sessions
  ~/.cortex/<project>/MEMORY_QUEUE.md - items pending human review
  ~/.cortex/.runtime/                 - audit.log, search history, caches
  ~/.cortex/.governance/              - governance policy JSON files
  ~/.cortex/global/skills/            - personal workflow slash commands
  ~/.cortex/global/CLAUDE.md          - user-level agent instructions

Finding Tags:

  Findings can be tagged with [decision], [pitfall], or [pattern]:
    [decision] architectural choice with rationale
    [pitfall]  bug or failure mode to avoid
    [pattern]  reusable approach that works well
  Use findingType param in add_finding, or prefix manually: "- [pitfall] ..."
  Tags are filterable in search_knowledge via the tag parameter.

Agent Support:

  Claude Code    - full hooks + MCP, writes ~/.claude/settings.json
  Cursor         - MCP only via ~/.cursor/mcp.json (no auto hooks)
  VS Code Copilot- MCP only via ~/.config/Code/User/mcp.json
  Codex CLI      - MCP only via ~/.codex/config.json
  Windsurf       - manual MCP setup (see docs/ide-setup.md)

Docs: https://alaarab.github.io/cortex/
Source: https://github.com/alaarab/cortex
